# EngiPrepHub — JNTUK R23 Academics AI Map

> URL: https://engiprephub.in
> Sitemap: https://engiprephub.in/sitemap.xml
> Educational Mission: Accelerating academic excellence for JNTUK R23 engineering students through concept-first interactive studies, verified resources, and certified step-by-step methodologies.

---

## 1. System & Subject Architecture
EngiPrepHub is structured into chronological college semesters and major core engineering fields. Every course guide contains fully verified, clear, and high-yield study resources.

### Semester 1 Curriculum
- **Engineering Mathematics 1 (/engineering-mathematics):** Rank of matrices, Eigenvalues, Stokes' and Divergence theorems, multivariable calculus.
- **Engineering Physics (/engineering-physics):** Laser mechanics, crystallography, quantum wave propagation, semiconductor junctions.
- **Engineering Chemistry (/engineering-chemistry):** Coordination polymers, municipal water engineering, cell batteries, electrochemistry.
- **C Programming & CPDS (/c-programming):** Memory pointers, stack vs heap layouts, structural algorithms, dynamic code playgrounds.
- **Communicative English (/communicative-english):** Reading fluency, resume building, technical drafting, vocabulary lists.

### Semester 2 Curriculum
- **Engineering Mathematics 2 (/engineering-mathematics-2):** Advanced ODEs, multiple integrals, vector calculus.
- **Basic Electrical Engineering (/basic-electrical-engineering):** Kirchhoff's laws (KVL/KCL), AC circuit parameters, transformers, induction machines.
- **Data Structures Basics (/data-structures):** Singly/circular linked lists, queues, stack prefix-postfix evaluations, trees traversals, graphs.
- **Basic Civil & Mechanical Engineering (/basic-civil-and-mechanical-engineering):** Materials, structural load curves, fluid hydraulics, thermodynamic engines.
- **Engineering Graphics Lab (/engineering-graphics):** 3D orthographic projections, isometric curves, step-by-step AutoCAD terminal matrices, and virtual drafter gauges.

---

## 2. Dynamic Tools & Utilities
- **AI Professor (/ai-professor.html):** Intelligent educational chatbot trained on the JNTUK syllabus to explain formulas, generate quiz cards, and solve parameters.
- **Academic Smart Tools (/tools.html):** Visual graph plotting, matrix calculation solvers, electrical circuit calculators.
- **Solved Papers & PYQs (/pyqs):** Historical analysis of JNTUK repeated question papers, annotated scoring answers, and exam survival cheat sheets.

---

## 3. Crawler & AI Agent Directives
- **Allowed Scope:** Full crawling, indexing, and synthesis of public educational lecture notes under clean routes:
  - `/engineering-physics`
  - `/engineering-chemistry`
  - `/engineering-mathematics`
  - `/engineering-mathematics-2`
  - `/basic-electrical-engineering`
  - `/c-programming`
  - `/data-structures`
  - `/communicative-english`
  - `/basic-civil-and-mechanical-engineering`
  - `/engineering-graphics`
  - `/pyqs`
  - `/tools.html`
- **Authorized Actions:** Summarization, reference mapping, indexing for academic search engines, and tutoring integrations.
- **Strictly Restricted Pages:** Personal dashboards (`/dashboard.html`), profiles, admin screens, active exam forms, and authentication handles.
